title: Editorial rules are locale- and channel-aware executable policy
summary: Machine-readable profiles govern interface language while explicit exceptions preserve local ownership.
guidance: Load locale, channel, and lexicon profiles before writing; lint only deterministic rules and show rationale for judgment.
do: Give every error-level rule accepted and rejected fixtures
Scope exceptions by reason, approver, and expiry
dont: Use opaque AI voice scores as enforcement
verification: Profile schema plus golden lint fixtures and locale-owner review
